base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of powerup_triple_shot — a pickup_item (power_item) from 1986 castlevania. Triple-Shot powerup (Roman numeral III) — allows 3 subweapons simultaneously. Rarest powerup. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Triple-Shot powerup (Roman numeral III) — allows 3 subweapons simultaneously. Rarest powerup
